title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build With AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Systems Architecture App
summary: A full-stack SaaS tutorial showing how to build a systems architecture design app using AI agents with minimal hand-written code. The project uses Next.js, Prisma, Postgres, TypeScript, and Tailwind, integrated with Clerk for authentication, Trigger.dev for workflows, Liveblocks for collaboration, and CodeRabbit for code review.
